name: SHIN SPLINTS
definition: SHIN SORENESS = MEDIAL TIBIAL STRESS SYNDROME = SOLEUS SYNDROME nonspecific term describing exertional lower leg pain
discriminating_features: normal radionuclide angiogram + blood-pool phase (DDx to stress fracture)
linear longitudinal uptake on delayed images

general: normal radionuclide angiogram + blood-pool phase (DDx to stress fracture)
linear longitudinal uptake on delayed images
